title: Pyrex – 8023509 – 3 Pieces; Glass Mixing Bowls/Salad Bowl – 0.5 L; 1 L; 2 L – Borosilicate Glass – Heavy Duty – Made in France
features: Strong borosilicate glass: ideal for allowing dough to rise or for baking in the oven
Glass transparency to keep track of your preparation
Suitable for use in ovens, microwaves, refrigerators, freezers and dishwashers.
description: From the manufacturer Discover Pyrex glass prepware range No good cooking without good preparation! Pyrex is the perfect partner for your day-to-day cooking moments. Perfect control over preparations is guaranteed! All the prepware ustensils are made of borosolicate glass. Supports extreme temperatures from -40°C to + 300°C Thermal shock resistant up to 220°C BPA free, hygienic material that does not retain stains or odors Scratch resistant Good food depends above all on good preparation To simplify the preparation step, Pyrex has developed a dedicated range to glass prepware ustensils. Pyrex measuring jugs and bowls are perfect for your day-to-day food preparation and cooking. The jugs will help you measure precisely while the mixing bowls will help you mix up your preparations. Made from tempered borosilicate glass , the products can be used safely on fridge , freezer , oven and microwave . Transparent, Pyrex jugs and bowls are scratch resistant and dishwasher friendly. Classic Jugs Pyrex jugs come in three sizes: 0,25 L 0,5 L 1 L Classic bowl Pyrex bowl comes in 4 sizes: 0,5 L 1 L 2 L 3 L Bowl with lid Pyrex bowl with lid comes in 3 sizes: ø 14cm ø 17cm ø 21cm Expert bowl Pyrex expert bowl is the perfect partner in all baking situations. It comes in a large size of 4.2 L and with a very efficient handle that makes mixing so much easier. Whether you are right or left handed. Expert bowl key features Measure and mix Easily-visible measuring scale to have better control over your preparation. Adjust 2 inclined areas to help making egg whites or whipped cream. Easy-handling 340° handle for easy grip whether you are right or left handed. Easy-pouring Large spout to pour your mixtures easily. Expert Bowl recipe Preparation 6 persons recipe Quick and easy in just 25 minutes! Squeeze and retrieve the juice of one lemon. Zest the lime. Pour the heavy cream in our Expert bowl and by using a mixing machine beat it until it's thick. Add the salt, lemon juice, lime zest and continue beating the chantilly, until the ingreadients are well incorporated. Put the chantilly cream in the fridge until it's cooled down. How to make the perfect Chantilly cream Ingredients 20cl heavy cream 1 lime 1 lemon A pinch of salt Tips Before starting the recipe, put the Expert bowl in the freezer for 5min to achieve better results. You can use our cream for either sweet or salty recipes.
